contexts.context: P. 7 Line 8 "Eliot hardly <mark>deserved</mark> it`:" Does this mean that you dont think Eliot...
...poetry comes to be written must be unique and <mark>deserves</mark> a place in the history of literature.
...or German.  And uin a way, Eliot hardly <mark>deserved</mark> it:  Not longo ago George Steiner referred to English...
